zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Massey IV於大約1163年出生在英國爾鄧翰 梅西時，他的父親Hamon de Massey III35歲，母親Agatha de Theray de Kryton45歲。他於1180年與Margery de Mainwaring在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Massey IV于大约1163年出生在英国爾鄧翰 梅西时，他的父亲Hamon de Massey III35岁，母亲Agatha de Theray de Kryton45岁。他于1180年与Margery de Mainwaring在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年在英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamon
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éaman
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Massey IV was born about 1163, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, his father, Hamon de Massey III, was 35 and his mother, Agatha de Theray de Kryton, was 45. He married Margery de Mainwaring in 1180, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1250, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey IVが約1163年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた時，父Hamon de Massey IIIは35歳，母Agatha de Theray de Krytonは45歳であった。1180年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイでMargery de Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで88歳で死去した。

ko.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey IV(이)가 대략 1163년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Massey III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha de Theray de Kryton(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Margery de Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Massey IV родился около 1163 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon de Massey III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Theray de Kryton, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Mainwaring в 1180 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon de Massey IV nació aproximadamente 1163, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon de Massey III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agatha de Theray de Kryton, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margery de Mainwaring en 1180, en Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1250, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años.
